name: Balsamic Glazed Chicken with Treviso
recipeIngredient: 2 medium red onion, sliced into 1-inch disks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F and preheat the grill.
2. Place the onion disks and giblets at the bottom of a small heavy-bottomed roasting pan.
3. Place the chicken on top of the onions, breast side up.
4. Pour the glass of Lambrusco over the onions and rub the chicken all over with 4 tablespoons balsamic vinegar.
5. Place the roasting pan in the oven and cook for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a skewer pushed into the thickest part of the thigh shows clear, not bloody juices.
6. Cut the Radicchio in half lengthwise and place it on the grill. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes per side.
7. Remove the radicchio from the grill and brush with extra virgin olive oil. Set aside.
8. Remove the bird from the oven and allow it to rest for 5 minutes.
9. Transfer the chicken to a carving platter. Place the onions and giblets in a bowl with the juices.
10. Carve the chicken, drizzle with remaining vinegar, and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
